samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en signal is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in is constant during data_en is high. The data_en signal is sampled at clk_b and should be synchronized to clk_a. The data_in is sampled at clk_a and should be sampled at clk_b.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data signal.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input enable signal.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state_idle">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="state_sync">1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset the data_reg and en_data_reg when arstn is low.</description>
            <if condition="arstn == 0">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="data_reg" value="0" />
                    <assign id="en_data_reg" value="0" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
            <description>Update data_reg with data_in when data_en is high.</description>
            <if condition="data_en == 1">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="data_reg" value="data_in" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
            <description>Update en_data_reg with data_en when arstn is high.</description>
            <if condition="arstn == 1">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="en_data_reg" value="data_en" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset the en_clap_one and en_clap_two when brstn is low.</description>
            <if condition="brstn == 0">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="en_clap_one" value="0" />
                    <assign id="en_clap_two" value="0" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
            <description>Update en_clap_one with en_data_reg when brstn is high.</description>
            <if condition="brstn == 1">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="en_clap_one" value="en_data_reg" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
            <description>Update en_clap_two with en_clap_one when brstn is high.</description>
            <if condition="brstn == 1">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="en_clap_two" value="en_clap_one" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <description>Assign dataout with data_reg when en_clap_two is high.</description>
            <if condition="en_clap_two == 1">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="dataout" value="data_reg" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
            <description>Assign dataout with dataout when en_clap_two is low.</description>
            <if condition="en_clap_two == 0">
                <sequential>
                    <assign id="dataout" value="dataout" />
                </sequential>
            </if>
        </combinational_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
